description_long: This object is a delicate bouquet of wildflowers, featuring a mix of small blossoms and buds in muted pink, white, and purple hues. The arrangement includes slender green stems and a variety of leaves, some of which are ovate and others more lanceolate, giving the bouquet a natural, slightly untamed appearance. The flowers are clustered together, with some petals overlapping and others standing apart, creating a sense of depth and texture. The stems are thin and flexible, supporting the flowers and leaves in a loosely gathered fashion. The overall look is airy and organic, with visible gaps between the stems and floral elements. This type of bouquet could be found in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative elements in public or private spaces.
description: A loosely gathered bouquet of wildflowers with slender green stems, muted pink and white blossoms, and a mix of ovate and lanceolate leaves. The arrangement is airy, natural, and slightly untamed.
description_view_0: The bouquet is seen from the front, showing the main cluster of flowers and a prominent central bud with leaves fanning out symmetrically.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the bouquet, with more visible layering of flowers and leaves, and some blossoms partially obscured.
description_view_2: The bouquet is viewed from the back, revealing the stems and the rear arrangement of leaves, with fewer visible flower faces.
description_view_3: A three-quarter view showing both the side and some of the front, with a good balance of visible flowers and leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a loosely radial configuration, with some overlapping and others spaced apart, creating a natural, irregular whorl typical of wildflowers.
